01 Our Mission

Instead of scrolling, rushing, drinking coffee alone — a weekend morning built around music, coffee, sunlight and real people.

Late enough for a relaxed start. Early enough to elevate the day, not extend the night. MRR reimagines the morning rave as a music-led social ritual — where people, coffee, bubbles and daylight come together around a curated, participatory experience.

02 Our Pillars

Four things that
actually
wake you up.

Every edition is built on the same four pillars —
no matter the venue, no matter the season.

01 / Energy

Morning
Energy

Sunlit venues. Specialty coffee & matcha. Breakfast bites. The opposite of a dark club.

02 / Music

Music &
Movement

DJs who know how to build energy. Good vibes. Space to dance without nightclub pressure.

03 / Drinks

Signature Drinks

Chef-developed, morning-coded.
Alcoholic + non-alcoholic.

04 / People

Real
People

A social atmosphere that works whether you come solo, in a pair, or with ten friends. Clean vibe. Real connection.

03 How It Works

From arrival to the last track.

Three hours. No rigid schedule — you can arrive any time.
 Here's how a morning flows.

10:00 — 10:45
Arrival
Pick your mood fan. Get your drink token. The DJ is already playing.
~10:45
Opening
A short welcome from the DJ. Not a ceremony — just a nod to the room.
11:00 — 11:30
Bites
Small pastries, finger food, morning-coded. Butler-served, passed through the crowd.
11:00 — 11:45
The Peak
Energy builds. Full dance journey.
The Guest Track lands somewhere in here.
12:45
Last Track
Every morning ends the same way — one song, chosen for the date, shared by everyone in the room.
04 Our Rituals

What happens
every time.

Four recurring rituals anchored into every edition,
no exceptions.

01 / Entry

Mood
Fan

Choose your colour at entry — signals your vibe to the room before you say a word.

02 / Welcome

Arrival
Welcome

Signature drink token on arrival. Breakfast bites, butler-served midway.

03 / Music

Guest
Track

One attendee gets to influence the DJ set — submitted before the event, woven into set.

04 / Closing

MRR Last
Track

A beloved song tied to the date closes every morning — nostalgia, recognition, together.

05 Our Venues

Every room
earns its place.

Natural light. Sound-readiness. Café-coded energy. We don't book dark rooms.

✦ Scouted for

Sunlight · Room to move · Morning feel

Bright, breathable spaces designed for movement and conversation — where café culture and sound naturally meet.

✕ Not this

Nightclub · Basement · No windows

No dark rooms. No neon. No spaces that ask you to pretend it's still last night.

06 Who It's For

You left the club behind.
Not the energy.

MRR is built for people who want to feel uplifted from the very beginning of the day — so they can go out, create and become what they're meant to be.
Here are the people who show up.

Expat /
Nomad

"New city. New ritual. New people."

You moved to Prague for work or adventure. Weekend mornings are prime time for discovery. You'd rather meet people over coffee and a dancefloor than at a loud bar at midnight.

Sober
Curious

"Social without the hangover."

You still want energy, music, connection — you just don't want the 3 AM part or the 10 AM regret. MRR lets you dance without negotiating with your next day.

Wellness
Warrior

"Your morning routine just got a dancefloor."

Pilates, matcha, specialty coffee, a documented routine. MRR is the natural next step — healthy hedonism, without the chaos.

07 The Community

Follow the build.

We're documenting every step — the venue scouting, the drink tastings, the DJs joining the circle. Pre-launch, Instagram is where it all happens.

@mrr.prague
08 Private & Corporate

Bring MRR to your people.

Company offsites, brand activations, private celebrations — MRR scales to private bookings. Morning-coded energy, custom programming, no nightclub baggage.

Company offsite morning rave 20–200 people · custom program
Full brand activation Co-branded · integrated · visible
Private celebration / birthday Morning format · intimate · joyful
Festival / venue collab Partnership · format licensing

All formats quoted individually.
